generated_oml:
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data source"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARRawDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Provides vehicle state information including speed and position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARRawDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data transmitted via ROS2 network"
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
    base:desc "Vehicle state data transmitted via ROS2 network"
]

instance LiDARRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARRawDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state data including speed and position"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler, ACCComputationEnabler, DataVisualizationEnabler
]

instance StructuredTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured object tracks derived from LiDAR processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARRawDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler, ACCComputationEnabler, DataVisualizationEnabler
]

instance PointCloudClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processes raw LiDAR data into structured object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Serializes data, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions for communication between software components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processes data for real-time visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, detected object tracks, and report generation via UI"
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTrackVisualization, VehicleStateVisualization, DrivingPathVisualization, GenerateReport
]

instance ObjectTrackVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of detected object tracks"
]

instance VehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data"
]

instance DrivingPathVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of projected driving paths"
]

instance GenerateReport : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generate reports based on vehicle data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC system computation (lead vehicle detection, speed calculation, control logic) from vehicle's ECU to Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetection, SpeedCalculation, ControlLogicExecution
]

instance LeadVehicleDetection : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of lead vehicle for adaptive cruise control"
]

instance SpeedCalculation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calculation of appropriate vehicle speed based on lead vehicle distance"
]

instance ControlLogicExecution : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Execution of control logic for speed regulation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCComputationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Handles ACC system computation offloading"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables operators to enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, and trigger emergency braking commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACC, DisableACC, SetDesiredSpeed, TriggerEmergencyBraking
]

instance EnableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance TriggerEmergencyBraking : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency braking command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance RemoteManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Handles remote management commands for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D visualization component for real-time data display"
]

instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control panel for remote management commands"
]

instance UserInterfaceEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User interface environment for Digital Twin"
    base:contains ThreeDVisualization, ControlPanel
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for coordination between devices to enable computation offloading, as mandated by hardware limitations, despite safety-critical vehicular standards typically requiring stricter synchronization."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system follows an entity-based architecture per ISO 23247 RA, with three distinct entities (Physical Twin, Digital Twin, User) each deployed on separate hardware. The Physical Twin Entity handles resource-specific functions (e.g., Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking) and device communication, the Digital Twin Entity manages data processing and control mechanisms, and the User Entity hosts visualization and control panel components. Each FE is implemented as a ROS2 package with associated nodes, and the architecture deviates from ISO 23247 by redefining the Physical Twin Entity's scope beyond the standard's OME."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components is facilitated by ROS2 network, while inter-entity communication uses UDP over Wi-Fi in the transport layer."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247:2021 Digital Twin Framework for Manufacturing standard, which includes four parts: Overview and general principles, Reference architecture (Part 2), Digital representation of physical manufacturing elements, and Information exchange. Part 2 defines an entity-based reference architecture comprising Observable Manufacturing Elements (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Functional Entities (FEs) within each entity handle specific tasks such as actuation, data transformation, and user interface, with OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) mentioned as a possible implementation protocol for FEs."
]
